ast.name: addOption
ast.source: Very strict - Only alphanumeric characters, and punctuation
ast.target: 非常严格 - 仅允许字母数字字符和标点符号

ast.name: addOption
ast.source: Strict - Only alphanumeric characters and links will be allowed
ast.target: 严格 - 仅允许字母数字字符和链接

ast.name: addOption
ast.source: Normal - Basic escaping for plugins like templater and dataview
ast.target: 正常 - 为 Templater 和 Dataview 等插件提供基本转义

ast.name: addOption
ast.source: Disabled - No escaping (may allow malicious content)
ast.target: 禁用 - 不进行转义（可能允许恶意内容）

ast.name: addOption
ast.source: Append - Add new content at the end
ast.target: 追加 - 在末尾添加新内容

ast.name: addOption
ast.target: 更新 - 覆盖现有内容

ast.name: addOption
ast.target: 无 - 不更新现有议题

ast.name: addOption
ast.source: None - Don't update existing pull requests
ast.target: 无 - 不更新现有拉取请求

ast.name: error
ast.source: GitHub token is not set. Please set it in settings.
ast.target: GitHub 令牌未设置。请在设置中设置它。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Error syncing issues and pull requests
ast.target: 同步议题和拉取请求时出错

ast.name: error
ast.source: No GitHub token provided. Please add your GitHub token in the settings.
ast.target: 未提供 GitHub 令牌。请在设置中添加您的 GitHub 令牌。

ast.name: error
ast.source: GitHub client or file manager not initialized
ast.target: GitHub 客户端或文件管理器未初始化

ast.name: error
ast.target: 获取 GitHub 议题时出错

ast.name: error
ast.target: 获取 GitHub 拉取请求时出错

ast.name: info
ast.target: 正在同步议题和拉取请求

ast.name: log
ast.source: You must import the full version of Bottleneck in order to use this feature.
ast.target: 您必须导入完整版本的 Bottleneck 才能使用此功能。

ast.name: log
ast.source: FATAL: Error occurred in "error" event handler
ast.target: 致命错误：在 \"error\" 事件处理器中发生错误

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 您的 GitHub 个人访问令牌

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically sync issues and pull requests when Obsidian starts
ast.target: Obsidian 启动时自动同步议题和拉取请求

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Control the level of notifications shown during sync
ast.target: 控制同步期间显示的通知级别

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Format for dates in issue files (e.g., yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss)
ast.target: 议题文件中的日期格式（例如，yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose how to handle Templater, Dataview and other plugin escaping in issue and pull request bodies.
ast.target: 选择如何处理议题和拉取请求正文中的 Templater、Dataview 和其他插件转义。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add a repository from GitHub or manually
ast.target: 从 GitHub 添加仓库或手动添加

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Filter repositories by name or owner
ast.target: 按名称或所有者筛选仓库

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable or disable issue tracking for this repository
ast.target: 启用或禁用此仓库的议题跟踪

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The folder where issue files will be stored
ast.target: 存储议题文件的文件夹

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How to handle updates to existing issues
ast.target: 如何处理现有议题的更新

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, issue files will be set to be deleted from your vault when the issue is closed or no longer matches your filter criteria
ast.target: 如果启用，当议题关闭或不再符合您的筛选条件时，议题文件将被设置为从您的保险库中删除

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Only track issues that have at least one assignee
ast.target: 仅跟踪至少有一个受让人的议题

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Only track issues assigned to this specific GitHub username (case-insensitive). Disable to track all assignees
ast.target: 仅跟踪分配给此特定 GitHub 用户名（不区分大小写）的议题。禁用以跟踪所有受让人

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Only track issues that were opened by a specific user
ast.target: 仅跟踪由特定用户打开的议题

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Only track issues opened by this specific GitHub username (case-insensitive)
ast.target: 仅跟踪由此特定 GitHub 用户名（不区分大小写）打开的议题

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable or disable pull request tracking for this repository
ast.target: 启用或禁用此仓库的拉取请求跟踪

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The folder where pull request files will be stored
ast.target: 存储拉取请求文件的文件夹

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How to handle updates to existing pull requests
ast.target: 如何处理现有拉取请求的更新

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, pull request files will be set to be deleted from your vault when the pull request is closed or no longer matches your filter criteria
ast.target: 如果启用，当拉取请求关闭或不再符合您的筛选条件时，拉取请求文件将被设置为从您的保险库中删除

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Only track pull requests that have at least one requested reviewer
ast.target: 仅跟踪至少有一个请求审阅者的拉取请求

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Only track pull requests with this specific GitHub username as a reviewer (case-insensitive). Leave empty to track all reviewers.
ast.target: 仅跟踪由此特定 GitHub 用户名（不区分大小写）作为审阅者的拉取请求。留空以跟踪所有审阅者。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Only track pull requests that have at least one assignee
ast.target: 仅跟踪至少有一个受让人的拉取请求

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Only track pull requests assigned to this specific GitHub username (case-insensitive). Disable to track all assignees.
ast.target: 仅跟踪分配给此特定 GitHub 用户名（不区分大小写）的拉取请求。禁用以跟踪所有受让人。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Only track pull requests that were opened by a specific user
ast.target: 仅跟踪由特定用户打开的拉取请求

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Only track pull requests opened by this specific GitHub username (case-insensitive)
ast.target: 仅跟踪由此特定 GitHub 用户名（不区分大小写）打开的拉取请求

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 默认：允许删除拉取请求

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.target: 输入您的 GitHub 令牌

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Disabling body content escaping may allow malicious scripts to execute in your vault. Are you sure you want to continue?
ast.target: 禁用正文内容转义可能会允许恶意脚本在您的保险库中执行。您确定要继续吗？

ast.name: warn
ast.target: 节流插件限制处理器出错

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please enter both owner and repository name
ast.target: 请输入所有者和仓库名称

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: This repository is already being tracked

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please set your GitHub token in settings first
ast.target: 请先在设置中设置您的 GitHub 令牌

ast.name: name
ast.target: 同步 GitHub Issues 和拉取请求

ast.name: text
ast.source: Please limit the token to the minimum permissions needed. For more information. Requirements are Issues, Pull Requests, and Repositories. Read more
ast.target: 请将令牌限制为所需的最小权限。更多信息。要求是 Issues、Pull Requests 和 Repositories。了解更多

ast.name: text
ast.source: CAUTION: especially if using Plugins that enable script execution. In disabled mode, no escaping will be done.
ast.target: 警告：特别是如果使用启用脚本执行的插件。在禁用模式下，不会进行任何转义。

ast.name: text
ast.source: In normal mode '`', '{{', '}}', '<%' and '%>' will be escaped. (This has the side effect of not allowing code blocks to be rendered)
ast.target: 在普通模式下，'`'、'{{'、'}}'、'<' 和 '%>' 将被转义。（这会产生不允许代码块渲染的副作用）

ast.name: text
ast.source: In strict mode only alphanumeric characters, '.,'()/[]{}*+-:"' and whitespace will be allowed. This will remove any html like rendering and templating, but persist links
ast.target: 在严格模式下，仅允许字母数字字符、'.,'()/[]{}*+-:\"' 和空白字符。这将移除任何类似 HTML 的渲染和模板，但保留链接

ast.name: text
ast.source: In very strict mode only alphanumeric characters, and '.,' or whitespace will be allowed. This will remove any html like rendering and templating.
ast.target: 在非常严格模式下，仅允许字母数字字符、'.,' 或空白字符。这将移除任何类似 HTML 的渲染和模板。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No repositories found. Please add a repository to get started.
ast.target: 未找到仓库。请添加一个仓库以开始使用。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Configure tracking settings for this repository
ast.target: 配置此仓库的跟踪设置

ast.name: text
ast.source: Configure how issues are tracked and stored
ast.target: 配置问题的跟踪和存储方式

ast.name: text
ast.source: Configure how pull requests are tracked and stored
ast.target: 配置拉取请求的跟踪和存储方式
